title: Moldova Vehicle Registration/Technological-Operation Request — Private Owners (Cerere privind operațiunile tehnologice cu mijlocul de transport, pentru proprietari particulari)
description: The Agenția Servicii Publice's (ASP, Public Services Agency, the legal successor of the former Î.S. "Registru" state enterprise named in this form's own print-shop footer) standard "CERERE" (Request) form for private vehicle owners, filed to request a technological operation on a motor vehicle's registration record — e.g. first-time registration, re-registration on a change of owner, replacement of registration plates, or deregistration. ASP publishes this as form 3-4/7 alongside a sibling form (3-4/8) for legal-entity (persoane juridice) owners, which is out of scope of this document. The form itself provides no fixed picklist of operation types; the specific operation being requested is captured as the applicant's own free-text statement under "Rog" ("I request"), rather than a fabricated enum this source does not offer. This document models the private owner's own identity/contact data, a reference to any existing registration plate/document the vehicle already carries, the vehicle's own identifying and technical particulars, and the free-text list of documents the applicant attaches in support of the request. Three categories of the source form are deliberately out of scope, each an administrative/back-office element rather than applicant-supplied data: the pre-title "ELIBERAT p/t" / "n/î" header stub (a post-processing issuance reference an office fills in once the request is completed, not something the applicant supplies when filing); the "operația tehnologică ... cod" 2-digit classification box (an internal ASP transaction-type code assigned from the agency's own back-office code table, not a value the applicant would know or self-assign); and the "Centrul Militar", "EXPERT", "VERIFICAREA DI (9-31, 9-73)", "Verificarea vehiculului", and "Verificarea actelor" blocks (respectively a military-registration-authority stamp box and four staff/inspector verification lines completed by ASP personnel during processing, not by the applicant). The closing wet-ink "Semnătura personală" signature itself is excluded per this registry's standing convention on physical signatures, but the adjoining date is modeled as applicationDate. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Moldova or Agenția Servicii Publice.

source.documentRef: Cerere (pentru proprietari particulari) — formular 3-4/7, Agenția Servicii Publice

verification.notes: GOV-3157, delegated from the GOV-3152 'GovSchema Standard Research' cycle. Opens Moldova's DMV vertical (2nd of 6, after Business Formation via md/asp/cerere-inregistrare-intreprinzator-individual, GOV-3115). Source re-fetched fresh this cycle rather than trusted from the prior scouting note as-is: HTTP 200, media type application/pdf, 216,735 bytes, sha256 8ea235ff626f3089efeceecf2f5b3a804e4b8c18d86ae68c1212655119558e50, genuine %PDF-1.4 header, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate anywhere on asp.gov.md or the e-services.md index that links it. Unlike this registry's other recent Moldovan find (md/asp/cerere-inregistrare-intreprinzator-individual, a native text-layer PDF), this single-page PDF is a genuine scanned/rasterized image: pdfjs-dist@3.11.174's getTextContent() returned zero text items and getAnnotations() returned zero widgets (no AcroForm), so the entire field list below was read from a node-canvas render at 4x scale (2380x3368px) rather than any text-extraction pass — a genuine non-text-layer source, disclosed here per this registry's established practice for scanned/print-and-fill forms (see e.g. do/mirex/passport-application's vector-grid disclosure for the general pattern, though this case is a true raster scan rather than a vector-drawn grid pdfjs-dist's text layer missed). The form carries no printed asterisks, bold markers, or any other explicit required/optional convention anywhere (unlike do/mirex/passport-application's '*' convention) — requiredness below is a judgment call based on which data a private-owner vehicle transaction structurally cannot proceed without (owner identity, vehicle identifying particulars), with block/apartment-style sub-fields and secondary contact/notes fields modeled optional, disclosed explicitly rather than asserted as sourced from a printed convention. The form's own comb-style box grids for COD VIN / Motor nr. / Caroseria nr. / Șasiul nr. are each subdivided by forward slashes into individual character cells; the exact cell count could not be reliably determined from the rendered image (uniform tick marks with no printed numbered guide, unlike a dated triple like dd/mm/yyyy), so each is modeled as a free-text string with a generous maxLength rather than asserting an unverified exact character count or a modern 17-character VIN pattern this legacy Soviet-derived form template does not itself print. Two occurrences of the ambiguous abbreviation 'n/î' (once in the pre-title header alongside 'ELIBERAT p/t', once immediately after 'Marca, model' in the vehicle-description block) could not be confidently resolved to a specific applicant-facing meaning from the rendered image alone (no distinguishing sub-label, and both sit adjacent to what read elsewhere as office/tracking content) — neither occurrence is modeled as a field, disclosed here as an interpretive judgment call rather than a fabricated guess. 'buletin de identitate seria ___ Nr. ___ eliberat ___' — the single 'eliberat' ('issued') blank carries no sub-label distinguishing an issuing authority from an issuance date, unlike the form's own explicit 'Data nașterii' label elsewhere; modeled as a single free-text field (identityCardIssuedBy) capturing whatever the applicant writes, disclosed as a judgment call. personalIdNumber carries a 13-digit numeric pattern based on Moldova's published IDNP (numărul de identificare de stat al persoanei fizice) numbering standard, an external public standard not printed digit-by-digit on the form itself, mirroring the precedent set in md/asp/cerere-inregistrare-intreprinzator-individual. documents[] (1 entry, optional) reflects the form's own generic 'La cerere se anexează: 1. 2. 3.' three-line numbered placeholder with no itemized document types printed anywhere, modeled as a single optional supporting-evidence entry rather than fabricating specific document names the source does not print — the same modeling choice used for the sibling Business Formation schema's documents[] entry. The form's pre-printed 'Semnătura personală ... 200_' signature-date line carries an obsolete two-digit-year suffix baked into this legacy print template (also visible in the two inspector-verification lines below it); despite this, the source file itself was independently confirmed live and unchanged this cycle (fresh HTTP 200 fetch, matching sha256, current asp.gov.md domain) — applicationDate is modeled as a standard ISO date field rather than reproducing the obsolete '200_' print quirk, since an applicant filing in 2026 would simply write the actual current date regardless of the stale pre-print.

fields.name: existingPlateSeries
fields.label: Numere de înmatriculare seria
fields.description: Series of the vehicle's existing Moldovan registration plate, when this request concerns a vehicle already carrying Moldovan plates (e.g. a change-of-owner re-registration). Left blank for a vehicle never before registered in Moldova.

fields.name: existingPlateNumber
fields.label: Numere de înmatriculare Nr.
fields.description: Number of the vehicle's existing Moldovan registration plate, alongside existingPlateSeries.

fields.name: registrationDocumentName
fields.label: Document de înregistrare
fields.description: Name/type of the vehicle's existing registration or title document (e.g. a prior Moldovan registration certificate, or an imported vehicle's foreign title/customs document) being referenced for this request.

fields.name: applicantFullName
fields.label: De la cetățeanul (N.P.P.)
fields.description: Full name of the requesting citizen (Nume, Prenume, Patronimic — last name, first name, patronymic).

fields.name: domicileAddress
fields.label: domiciliat în
fields.description: Street/locality portion of the applicant's registered domicile address; see houseNumber/blockNumber/apartmentNumber for the remaining address components printed on the following line.

fields.name: blockNumber
fields.label: bloc
fields.description: Building/block number, when the applicant's address is a multi-block complex.

fields.name: identityCardIssuedBy
fields.label: eliberat
fields.description: Issuing detail (authority and/or date) for the applicant's buletin de identitate, as printed on the single 'eliberat' blank with no further sub-label. Modeled as free text since the source does not distinguish an issuing-authority sub-field from an issuance-date sub-field.

fields.name: personalIdNumber
fields.label: Codul personal (I.D.N.P.)
fields.description: The applicant's IDNP (numărul de identificare de stat al persoanei fizice), Moldova's 13-digit national personal identification number.

fields.name: requestDescription
fields.label: Rog
fields.description: The applicant's own free-text statement of the specific technological operation being requested (e.g. first-time registration, re-registration on change of owner, plate replacement, deregistration). The source form prints no fixed picklist of operation types for this blank.

fields.name: vehicleVin
fields.label: COD VIN
fields.description: The vehicle's identification code, printed on the source as a comb-style box grid subdivided by forward slashes. Exact cell count could not be reliably determined from the rendered image; modeled as free text rather than asserting an unverified fixed length or a modern 17-character VIN pattern.

fields.name: bodyNumber
fields.label: Caroseria nr.
fields.description: The vehicle's body (caroserie) number, when distinct from its VIN and engine number — a distinction this legacy form preserves from the Soviet-era practice of tracking body/chassis/engine numbers as separate identifiers.

fields.name: vehicleType
fields.label: Tipul vehiculului
fields.description: The kind of vehicle (e.g. autoturism/passenger car, camion/truck, motocicletă/motorcycle).

fields.name: grossVehicleWeight
fields.label: Masa autorizată
fields.description: The vehicle's authorized/gross weight, in kilograms.

fields.name: curbWeight
fields.label: Masa proprie
fields.description: The vehicle's own/curb weight (unladen), in kilograms.

fields.name: engineDisplacement
fields.label: Cap. cilindr.
fields.description: The engine's cylinder capacity/displacement, in cubic centimeters.

fields.name: fuelType
fields.label: Sursa de energie a motorului
fields.description: The engine's power source (e.g. benzină/petrol, motorină/diesel, gaz, electric). The source form prints no fixed picklist for this blank; modeled as free text.

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: Semnătura personală ... 200_
fields.description: Date the applicant signs the request, adjoining the wet-ink personal signature (excluded per this registry's standing convention on physical signatures). The source's own pre-printed line carries an obsolete two-digit-year '200_' suffix baked into this legacy template; modeled as a standard ISO date rather than reproducing that print quirk.
